meaning: n.咽喉,胃,暴食,山峡,峡谷,障碍物v.狼吞虎咽,塞饱
examples: Wind was funnelling through the gorge.
Ahead was the deep V of a gorge with water pouring down it.
Olduvai Gorge, an early hominid site in Tanzania, was found by a butterfly hunter who literally fell into its deep valley in 1911.
It is a collaborative project between the The Ironbridge Gorge Museum Trust and Meadow Arts.
Heart-stopping switchbacks plummeted downwards between dark cliffs into a gorge cut by the Khunjerab River.
